SOURCE: 15576950.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (15576950.pdf)
SUMMARY: Staffing and recruiting professional with experience in creating and implementing electronic hiring processes, onboarding new employees, and maintaining personnel records.
SKILLS: Benefits, Clerical, Conferences, CPR, Customer service, Data entry, Directing, Documentation, Fashion, Faxes, Focus, Hiring, Human resources, HR, Insurance, Inventory, Meetings, Access, Office, Neat, Policies, Processes, Recruitment, Recruiting, Reporting, SAP, Spanish, Staffing, Taking messages, Telephone, Telephones

SOURCE: 15576950.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 07/2015 to Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Assisted in establishing and implementing the hiring process.', 'Created and implemented an electronic hiring process that reduced time to hire from 1 hour to 30 minutes on average.', 'Developed the first electronic application for production hiring.', 'Explain terms of position with new hires.', 'Responsible for onboarding new employees, including administering paperwork, E-Verify, and I-9 Verification.', 'Established relationships with HR managers.', 'Coordinated driver-recruiting process.']

SOURCE: 15576950.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 10/2010 to 07/2015
DESCRIPTION: ['Assisted in staffing and compliance for 16 area locations.', 'Managed over 100 people as direct reports.', 'Developed the first electronic application for production hiring.', 'Collaborated with team on detailed hiring processes.', 'Reviewed I-9 and E-Verify forms.', 'Knowledgeable in SAP, ADHOC, Training and Events, and e-Recruitment.']

SOURCE: 15576950.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 03/2009 to 10/2010
DESCRIPTION: ['Analyzed employment-related data and prepared reports.', 'Managed employee life cycle process including onboarding and offboarding.', 'Communicated duties, compensation, benefits, and working conditions to new hires.', 'Worked extensively in SAP.', 'Conducted exit interviews.']

SOURCE: 15576950.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 08/2007 to 03/2009
DESCRIPTION: ['Maintained open position postings.', 'Managed customer service focus with employees and applicants.', 'Verified applicant references and employment history.', 'Experienced in multiple line telephones, handling routine inquiries, directing calls, and taking messages.']

SOURCE: 15576950.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 10/2006 to 03/2007
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed the receptionist area.', 'Greeted visitors and responded to telephone and in-person requests for information.']

SOURCE: 15576950.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: 
DATES: 09/2005 to 10/2006
DESCRIPTION: ['Greeted and received visitors.', 'Answered heavy phone traffic.']
